articles.title: Goodbye, Porter Square Shopping Center. Hello, ‘The Mix.’
articles.description:
CAMBRIDGE — Just steps from the Porter MBTA stop, there it is. A Dunkin’ and a Panera Bread. A liquor store, a hardware store, a Star Market, and lots of other smaller places scattered in between. For many long years, this was the Porter Square Shopping Center. But that was then. Now it’s something else. […]
